name: phase3-on-save-deepracer-agent-tool
description: Review deepracer_agent_tool.py for Phase 3 vision loop safety when saved

action.message:
deepracer_agent_tool.py was just saved. Review it for Phase 3 safety:
1. _should_assess() returns False for 'stop' and 'connect' actions
2. _should_assess() returns False when step_seconds < VISION_MIN_STEP_SECS
3. _assess_and_decide() returns 'continue' immediately when get_latest_frame() returns None
4. asyncio.wait_for wraps assess_step() call with VISION_ASSESS_TIMEOUT — TimeoutError returns 'continue'
5. 'abort' decision: calls deepracer_stop() BEFORE setting result.aborted
6. 'replan' decision: replan_count < MAX_REPLANS checked before acting; at limit returns 'continue'
7. validate_plan() called on every vision-triggered replan
8. Main loop checks self._task_state.status != RUNNING and self._shutdown_event.is_set() at top of every iteration
9. Hardware step failure still calls deepracer_stop() even when vision is active
10. _execute_approved_plan() uses _instruction_hint or pattern as original_instruction
Report any violations.
